title: Sakura Rosea
description: A cherry tree biome mod (with a few more things)
body:
_**QSL is REQUIRED for this mod to work.**_

_**TerraBlender is REQUIRED for this mod to work.**_


_**A huge thank you to the [TerraformersMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria) team for the help on this!**_


On 1.19.4 and below, this mod plays as standalone biome generation.
For 1.20+, it will replace textures and names of the vanilla Cherry Biome, but maintain the wood plank textures from base game. Bricks and its components will still be there. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/620/222/image-5.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/620/225/image-7.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/620/223/image-6.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/620/219/image.png) You're free to add this to your modpack! Our only conditions are that you don't change any assets, and link to this page somewhere if you redistribute it. ---------- ## **THIS IS A QUILT MOD! <3** _**- Okay, but how do I use Quilt?**_ You go to [https://quiltmc.org/en/install/](https://beta.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fquiltmc.org%252fen%252finstall%252fclient%252f) and click on the "universal" option. It installs like any other modloader. You will also (probably) need QSL for mods to work. You can [get it here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/qsl) or click on the Quilt image at the very top of this page. _**- What about my Fabric mods?!**_ All Fabric mods are compatible with Quilt! Using Quilt will not prevent you from loading any Fabric mods, you can add as many as you want and use both Fabric and Quilt mods by just installing Quilt. _**- Will you continue to update for Fabric?**_ No. There's really no need for it since Quilt loads Fabric mods anyways. You will always be able to load your Fabric mods on Quilt :) ---------- If you need support, please contact us through our Discord.
